blocks.text: One thing to add under what Michelle sent. Going through the {{fact:f:E-2024-001.client}} record, the widest gap is not in the press coverage, which is broadly fair, but in the investor-day and earnings transcripts, where the capital-allocation story either is not told or is told two different ways. That is the kind of gap that reads as evasiveness from the outside even when it is only disorganization on the inside.

Before I fix that as a finding I want those last two calls. If Robert Smith can confirm they are cleared for us, or say who holds them, I can close the section this week; otherwise I will mark the capital-story read as provisional rather than overstate what the record actually supports. I will route the draft to Michelle Rose once the sources are all behind it.
